Délai : 4 à 8 semaines après promesse: Timeline: 4 to 8 weeks after the offer
Délai médian : 35-45 jours. Lorraine est: Median timeline: 35-45 days. Lorraine is a buyer-loyalty market — there are fewer showings but more qualified ones, which often means fewer offers but a more direct negotiation.
Délai médian condo : 60 jours (+11 j vs: Median condo timeline: 60 days (+11 days vs last year). Sales are slowing (−16%) despite the price increase. If you're selling a condo, plan for 60-75 days and a stepped-up marketing effort.
Délai médian de vente (vs 52 j marché): Median time to sell (vs 52 days market)
Délai médian du marché : 52 jours. Sur m: Market median timeline: 52 days. On my listings:
Délai médian sur mes inscriptions : 32 j: Median timeline on my listings: 32 days. For properties above $1.2M, plan for 60-90 days — the high-end segment requires more patience and a very targeted buyer.

Délais raccourcis de moitié (23 j), cond: Timelines halved (23 days), condo +9%, plex +17%. The hottest market in the southern Laurentians in Q1 2026.
Démographie en évolution depuis 2022 ave: Demographics shifting since 2022 with the arrival of new condos — more young professionals, a mix less dominated by empty-nesters than 5 years ago.

depuis 33 ans, je connais les particular: for 33 years, I've known the specifics of this market: what sells quickly (15,000+ sq ft lots, turnkey renovated properties, high-end condos), and what takes more patience (properties needing a refresh, prices above $1.3M).
depuis 33 ans, je positionne chaque insc: for 33 years, I've positioned every listing by cross-referencing transactions from the past 12 months within 500 m, comparable active inventory and the seasonal trends of the target neighbourhood. Up-to-date APCIQ and Centris data, a rigorous method.
